Recorded as TBD; see Table 6.3 for the per-adjacency values.

Planned zone. Per UDC Sec. 4.7.24, regulations are provided in Section 3.5.5; no fixed dimensional standards are listed in the Sec. 6.3 dimensional standard tables. All numeric standards recorded as TBD (established per approved PAD plan).

Planned zone. Per UDC Sec. 4.7.25, provisions are established through the planned community development process; no fixed dimensional standards are listed in the Sec. 6.3 dimensional standard tables. All numeric standards recorded as TBD (established per approved PCD plan).
